title: Leather In Stock
description: This datapack greatly increases the availability of leather.
body:
This datapack makes a number of changes to make leather notably more plentiful.

No more choosing between raiding villagers' cabinets or setting up a big cow farm before you can enchant anything.

- More mobs drop leather
- Some mobs drop rabbit hide (an easier way to acquire it if you have the bundle recipe active)
- Mobs drop a larger amount of leather
- You can now smelt rotten flesh for rabbit hide

While this datapack uses format 26, it is likely compatible with any others that use the same loot table and recipe format.
